What it is: Time source every appliance syncs to
The Active Directory domain the SDDC integrates with
Notes: Forest root reachable from the SDDC

What it is: Service account used to join / bind to AD
Where SDDC computer/service objects are created
AD group mapped to the admin role
AD group mapped to the operator role
AD group mapped to the viewer role
AD account the broker binds with (read on base DN)
Notes: Needs TGGAU read if using Global Catalog

What it is: Top of the directory tree queries start from
Where the groups to sync live
Notes: Set high enough to cover ALL sync groups (single DN)

What it is: Root CA cert for encrypted LDAP
Users sign in as user@suffix (not email)
Notes: KB 393150 - domain UPN not email address

What it is: AD group mapped to the admin role
Notes: Must be a UNIVERSAL group if using Global Catalog

What it is: Which certificate authority signs the certs
Notes: Microsoft CA or OpenSSL (fleet cert management); external CA is CSR-based only - VCF won't import a private key

What it is: The template used to issue SDDC certs

Notes: Full replacement is a Day-2 step
